title: laurelia sempervirens
intro: Laurelia sempervirens, also known as the Tawhero or New Zealand laurel, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Laurelia sempervirens include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
